channel.title: Online Learning on Prabhat Reddy
channel.description: Recent content in Online Learning on Prabhat Reddy

item.title: Introduction to Sequential Decision Making
item.description: Introduction Say you are a college student and you moved to a new hostel. You go to the mess to have food, where you find two options you can choose from: rice and roti. In this situation, ponder over the following questions and get answers for them. Which one (between rice and roti) would you pick? Would you trust the decision that you made? Why? Would your decision change when you go to the mess the next day?
